description.value: Grants the @UUID[Compendium.pf1.buffs.Item.NWImcWGTjCtw1Zf0]{haste }effect (as the spell) and the @UUID[Compendium.pf-content.pf-class-abilities.Item.dTseFA94lu1HcJJr]{sickened }condition. Creatures immune to being sickened don't gain the haste effect.

scriptCalls.name: Toggle Sickened & Haste
